一分货: you get what you pay for
一哄而上: to rush forward all at once
一片狼藉: in a state of utter mess
一草一木: every blade of grass and tree
上下车: getting on and off a vehicle
不知情: to be unaware of the situation
中投: China Investment Corp. (abbr.); or mid-range shot
为人处世: how one conducts oneself in life
主动出击: to take the initiative; go on the offensive
久坐: to sit for a long time
亲眼看到: to see with one's own eyes
传奇色彩: legendary flavor, an air of legend
修身养性: to cultivate one's mind and character
倒不如: would be better to; might as well
借酒消愁: to drown one's sorrows in drink
做点事: to do a bit of work
元大都: Dadu, capital of the Yuan Dynasty (a place)
光送: to only give as a gift
写成: to write into; to compose as
冬暖夏凉: warm in winter, cool in summer
出海打鱼: to go out to sea to fish
出海捕鱼: to go out to sea to fish
刀削: to shave with a knife (e.g. noodles)
初六: the sixth day (of the lunar month)
删繁就简: to simplify by cutting the superfluous
前两天: a few days ago; the past couple of days
前去: to go to; to proceed to
动手做: to get hands-on, to do it oneself
十几里: more than ten li (a few miles)
发自内心: from the bottom of one's heart
只怕有心人: as long as one is determined
围坐在: to sit around (in a circle) at
大禹治水: Yu the Great taming the floods (legend)
天下无难事: nothing in the world is difficult
天南海北: far and wide; all over the place
如梦初醒: to suddenly wake up to the truth
山脚下: at the foot of the mountain
岁寒三友: pine, bamboo and plum (three friends of winter)
强记: to memorize by force, to cram
待制: waiting to be summoned (imperial official title)
心情舒畅: to feel happy and at ease
忠言逆耳利于行: honest advice grates on the ear but aids conduct
怕人: afraid of people; shy around people
怡情: to please and soothe the mind
想干什么: what do you want to do
愚公: Yugong (Foolish Old Man, from a Chinese fable)
手不释书: always with a book in hand
手到病除: to cure at a touch (skilled doctor)
手把手: hand in hand, step by step
打打: to give it a hit; to play
拜他为师: to take him as one's teacher
持币待购: to hold money waiting to buy
捡回来: to pick up and bring back
换批: to switch to a new batch
掐头去尾: to cut off both ends; leave out the beginning and end
推掉: to push away; to decline (an offer)
撑住: to hold up, to hold on
断后: to bring up the rear (cover a retreat)
无异于: to be tantamount to; no different from
日行千里: to travel a thousand li a day
春秋时期: Spring and Autumn Period (a historical era)
晒被子: to air out a quilt in the sun
极目远眺: to gaze far into the distance
查字典: to look up in a dictionary
桌边: table side; edge of the table
沉醉于: to be intoxicated by; engrossed in
没过几天: within a few days; soon after
济世: to help the world; benefit society
海光: glimmer of the sea; sea light
父子俩: father and son (the two of them)
玄宗时: in the time of Emperor Xuanzong
用书: to use a book; reference book
由此可知: from this it can be seen
由此而来: to come from this; thus derived
病入骨髓: illness gone into the bones (beyond cure)
的确如此: indeed so; that's really the case
破壁飞去: to break through the wall and fly off
碰碰: to give a bump; to touch
秋水共长天一色: autumn waters merging with the sky (poetic line)
空腹吃: to eat on an empty stomach
笑笑: to smile; to laugh a little
第二年: the second year; the following year
简单易行: simple and easy to carry out
算清楚: to work out clearly; figure out
红学家: scholar of Redology (Dream of the Red Chamber studies)
结为: to become (form a bond, e.g. sworn siblings)
老人与海: The Old Man and the Sea
老弱病残: the old, weak, sick and disabled
考博士: to take the doctoral entrance exam
考大学: to take the college entrance exam
良药苦口利于病: good medicine is bitter but cures illness
落霞与孤鹜齐飞: sunset glow flies with a lone wild duck
虚心听取: to listen with an open mind
被誉为: to be hailed as; acclaimed as
装不下: can't fit; too much to hold
见于: to be found in; to appear in
赠与: to give as a gift; to donate
走上: to step onto; to embark on
起到: to play (a role); to serve (a function)
越做越: the more one does..., the more...
越长越: the more it grows, the more...
跳龙门: to leap the dragon gate (idiom for success)
过与不及: going too far and falling short
进而言之: furthermore, to go a step further
远走他乡: to leave for a distant land
迷失方向: to lose one's sense of direction
那群人: that group of people; that crowd
钻进去: to squeeze into; to get inside
问明: to ask and find out clearly
附有: to be attached with; to come with
集大成者: one who brings together all achievements
马行空: a galloping horse across the sky (unfettered)
鼎足而立: to stand like the three legs of a tripod
